title: Accounts
lede: Accounts are the companies and organizations you work with. Group the contacts and leads that belong to a business under one account so you can see everything in one place.

steps.title: Open the Accounts list
steps.content:
1. In the left navigation, open CRM and click Accounts (or go to /crm/accounts).
  2. Each row is a company, showing its Name, Stage, and details.
  3. Click a company name to open its profile and see the contacts and leads linked to it.

Use accounts when you sell to businesses: one account (the company) can have many contacts (the people who work there).

images.caption: The Accounts list of companies with search and filters
The Accounts list of companies with search and filters

steps.title: Add a new account
steps.content:
1. Click Create (New Account) at the top of the list.
  2. Enter the company Name.
  3. Fill in optional details such as the address, Stage, and any custom fields.
  4. Click Save.

steps.title: Link contacts and leads to an account
steps.content:
• When you create or edit a Contact or Lead, pick the company in the Account field.
  • From the Leads or Contacts list, select records and use Assign to an Account to link many at once.
  • Open an account to see all of its people together, and jump to that company's leads by clicking through from the account.

steps.title: Search, filter, and tag
steps.content:
• Use the search box to find a company by name, email, or phone.
  • Add filters for Stage, Tags, Address, City, or Owner.
  • Add tags to group companies (for example by territory or industry), then filter by them.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Fill your accounts with people and reach out.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:

metaDescription: Create company accounts in the iMash CRM and link contacts and leads to them. Search, filter, tag, and manage B2B relationships in one place.
metaKeywords: accounts, companies, organizations, B2B CRM, account management, link contacts, business relationships
